mapper.sql: ci.issue_no AS issueNo, ci.issue_code AS issueCode, ci.coupon_no AS couponNo, ci.member_no AS memberNo, ci.order_no AS orderNo, ci.status, ci.used_date AS usedDate, ci.issue_date AS issueDate, c.coupon_code AS couponCode, c.coupon_type AS couponType, c.coupon_name AS couponName, c.benefit_type AS benefitType, c.benefit_value AS benefitValue, c.min_order_price AS minOrderPrice, c.max_discount_price AS maxDiscountPrice, c.start_date AS startDate, c.end_date AS endDate, c.caution, sp.company_name AS companyName, m.member_id AS memberId, m.name AS memberName
FROM coupon_issue ci LEFT JOIN coupon c ON ci.coupon_no = c.coupon_no LEFT JOIN seller_profile sp ON c.seller_no = sp.seller_no LEFT JOIN member m ON ci.member_no = m.member_no

sql.where:
ci.status NOT IN ('DELETED', '삭제')
AND
CAST(ci.issue_no AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
CAST(ci.coupon_no AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
c.coupon_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
m.member_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
( CAST(ci.issue_no AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR CAST(ci.coupon_no AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.coupon_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.member_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select:
SELECT
WHERE ci.status NOT IN ('DELETED', '삭제') ORDER BY ci.issue_no DESC

SELECT
WHERE ci.status NOT IN ('DELETED', '삭제') ORDER BY ci.issue_no DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM coupon_issue ci WHERE ci.status NOT IN ('DELETED', '삭제')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon_issue(issue_code, coupon_no, member_no, order_no, status, used_date, issue_date) VALUES(#{issueCode}, #{couponNo}, #{memberNo}, #{orderNo}, COALESCE(#{status}, '발급'), #{usedDate}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon_issue SET issue_code = #{issueCode}, coupon_no = #{couponNo}, member_no = #{memberNo}, order_no = #{orderNo}, status = #{status}, used_date = #{usedDate} WHERE issue_no = #{issueNo}
